title: Licensing requirements; exemptions
doc_html:
§453.  Licensing requirements; exemptions

No vehicle which has been registered and licensed as a street rod pursuant to this Section and to R.S. 47:463.12 shall be subject to the regular motor vehicle licensing requirements.

Added by Acts 1980, No. 587, §1.

§453.  Licensing requirements; exemptions
